a260716p1.summary: (AST SpaceMobile) — AST SpaceMobile, a rival to SpaceX's Starlink Mobile, is delaying the timing of its satellite-to-phone service to 2027 …
a260716p1.title: Filing: AST SpaceMobile delays the launch of its satellite-to-phone service to 2027 after the Blue Origin mishap and plans to raise $1B in convertible notes (Michael Kan/PCMag)

a260716p2.summary: Hyundai Motor Group said on Thursday it would make U.S. robotics company Boston Dynamics a wholly owned subsidiary by acquiring SoftBank Group's …
a260716p2.title: Hyundai says it would make Boston Dynamics a wholly owned subsidiary by acquiring SoftBank's ~10% stake; Hyundai bought an 80% stake in Boston Dynamics in 2021 (Reuters)

a260716p20.summary: Two men who carried out a cyber-attack which crippled Transport For London (TfL) when they were teenagers have both been sentenced to five years and six months in prison.
a260716p20.title: Two Scattered Spider members who pleaded guilty in the UK to an August 2024 cyberattack on Transport for London are jailed for five and a half years (Joe Tidy/BBC)

a260716p21.summary: The EU says Google must let rival search engines and AI assistants have comparable access to Android and some Search data to comply with the DMA.
a260716p21.title: The EU issues two decisions under the DMA that order Google to provide rival AI assistants and search engines comparable access to Android and some Search data (Robert Hart/The Verge)

a260716p22.summary: Shares in British technology and online grocery group Ocado (OCDO.L) tumbled to a 13-year low on Thursday after it failed …
a260716p22.title: Ocado stock drops 14%, hitting a 13-year low, after it failed to show tangible progress in talks to secure new US partners for its warehouse automation tech (Sarah Young/Reuters)

a260716p23.summary: The startup teaches robots how to work in factories and homes — Munich-based robotics company Microagi …
a260716p23.title: Munich-based Microagi, which collects factory and household data to train humanoid robots, raised $55M led by Hummingbird in Germany's largest ever seed round (Éanna Kelly/Sifted)

a260716p24.summary: Applied Computing has secured fresh funding to expand its AI platform for energy operations, supporting international growth …
a260716p24.title: London-based Applied Computing, which is developing AI models for energy operations, raised $20M led by KBR, with participation from Databricks Ventures (Tamara Djurickovic/Tech.eu)

a260716p25.summary: The company wants to compete with Anthropic's Claude but has been slowed down by internal chaos and an inconsistent strategy.
a260716p25.title: Sources detail how xAI has been slowed down by internal chaos as Musk pushed for Grok to match Claude, amid signs it is turning a corner under Michael Nicolls (Carmen Arroyo/Bloomberg)

a260716p26.summary: In 2017, Nishith Khandwala was a Stanford computer science student with an idea—that you could take existing radiology scans …
a260716p26.title: Bunkerhill Health, which uses AI agents for hospital tasks like managing wait times, raised a $25M Series B led by Khosla, bringing its total funding to $55M (Allie Garfinkle/Fortune)

a260716p27.summary: Trump Media & Technology Group is launching a backend interface that will allow financial services companies to access real-time Truth Social data …
a260716p27.title: TMTG plans to launch Truth API on August 1 to provide real-time data from top Truth Social accounts to financial news organizations and trading firms (Sara Fischer/Axios)

a260716p28.summary: The cost of the latest artificial intelligence models is increasingly breeding anxiety among finance executives …
a260716p28.title: Fireworks, which helps developers access AI chips and open-source models, raised $1.5B at a $17.5B valuation and says it has exceeded $1B in annualized revenue (Jordan Novet/CNBC)

a260716p29.summary: 1Password is launching a new Claude integration for Mac users today. It's designed to let Anthropic's AI agent sign in to websites without seeing …
a260716p29.title: 1Password launches a new Claude integration for Mac that lets Anthropic's AI agent sign in to websites without seeing the user's password or 2FA code (Zac Hall/9to5Mac)

a260716p3.summary: Data center provider Csquare (CSQR.N) said on Thursday it raised $1.05 billion in its U.S. initial public offering as investors continued …
a260716p3.title: Data center company Csquare raises $1.05B in its US IPO, selling 50M shares at $21 each, below its marketed range of $23 to $27, valuing the company at ~$3.25B (Reuters)

a260716p30.summary: Marc Lore is ready to ring the bell. The serial entrepreneur—who previously sold Jet.com to Walmart for $3.3 billion …
a260716p30.title: Grubhub parent Wonder raised a $650M+ Series D at a $9B valuation, bringing its total raised to $3B+ since its founding in 2018, and plans to go public in 2027 (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)

a260716p31.summary: Sequoia partner Shaun Maguire still remembers the demo that changed his mind on Sable. — An AI sales rep was walking a buyer through …
a260716p31.title: Sable, which is building an AI agent named Aiden that lives on a company's website to run live product demos and more, raised $45M from Sequoia and 8VC (Lily Mae Lazarus/Fortune)

a260716p32.summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce its biggest overhaul to the iPad mini in half a decade, giving new life to a product that's popular …
a260716p32.title: Sources: Apple is prepping an iPad overhaul, including an iPad mini with an OLED screen by October and refreshed versions of entry-level iPad and Airs in 2027 (Mark Gurman/Bloomberg)

a260716p33.summary: Kimi K3 expected to exceed performance of Claude Opus 4.8 in sign of narrowing gap between US and China on frontier AI
a260716p33.title: Sources: Moonshot plans to launch Kimi K3, China's largest model to date with 2T-3T parameters, in the coming days; it's expected to outperform Claude Opus 4.8 (Financial Times)

a260716p34.summary: As a father to two young kids, Guanlan Dai sees a lot of similarities between AI agents and precocious children.
a260716p34.title: Runta, which provides isolated sandboxes and guardrails for AI agents to prevent operational risks, raised a $20M seed led by a16z at a $100M+ valuation (Stephanie Palazzolo/The Information)

a260716p37.summary: “Never settle” takes on a whole new meaning, as the once-maverick phone-maker retreats from the US and Europe.
a260716p37.title: OnePlus confirms it will no longer operate in North America or Europe but will keep operating in China, while Realme, another Oppo sub-brand, will exit China (CNET)

a260716p38.summary: Stablecoins have changed how people think about moving money, and their exponential rise over the past year …
a260716p38.title: Visa debuts the Visa Stablecoin Platform, an internal system to help its network of ~15K financial institutions and 200M+ merchants more easily use stablecoins (Camila Grigera Naón/Fortune)

a260716p39.summary: China's Anhui Korrun (300577.SZ) said a fund in which its subsidiary invested deployed 2.90 billion yuan for an indirect .8265% stake …
a260716p39.title: Filing: a Chinese luggage maker says a fund in which it invested deployed ~$420M for an indirect 0.8265% stake in DeepSeek, implying DeepSeek is valued at ~$52B (Eduardo Baptista/Reuters)

a260716p4.summary: Choose CNBC as your preferred source on Google and never miss a moment from the most trusted name in business news.
a260716p4.title: TSMC reports Q2 revenue up 36% YoY to ~$39.45B, net income up 77.4% YoY to ~$21.9B, both above est., and says chips 7nm or smaller were 77% of its wafer revenue (Jenny Lee/CNBC)

a260716p40.summary: Sheryl Sandberg has led a $10 million investment into Self Inspection, a San Diego-based startup that is also backed by former Tesla president Jon McNeill's DVx Ventures.
a260716p40.title: San Diego-based Self Inspection, which uses AI to assess body damage on a car with as little tech as a smartphone camera, raised $10M led by Sheryl Sandberg (Sean O'Kane/TechCrunch)

a260716p41.summary: We're renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook. It's the same standalone product, now doing more across the Google ecosystem and updated with a secure cloud computer.
a260716p41.title: Google renames NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook and rolls out an update giving every notebook a secure cloud computer, letting it write and execute code natively (Josh Woodward/Google)

a260716p42.summary: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.
a260716p42.title: Fora, which connects travel agents with travelers and offers agents AI tools, raised a $60M Series D at a $1B valuation led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures (Dominic-Madori Davis/TechCrunch)

a260716p43.summary: It's the latest push into AI from Roblox, which has embraced the technology. … Roblox is about to let people make games …
a260716p43.title: Roblox unveils Build, which lets users create basic games through text prompts directly within its mobile app, powered by Roblox's models and open-source models (Jay Peters/The Verge)

a260716p44.summary: Google announced on Thursday that it now allows users to link and interact with some of their go-to apps right in AI Mode, the tech giant's conversational search experience.
a260716p44.title: Google says users in the US can now link to and interact with some apps in AI Mode, including Instacart, Canva, and YouTube Music (Aisha Malik/TechCrunch)

a260716p45.summary: The group is trying to extend its influence beyond Meta. — The Oversight Board, the independent content moderation organization created …
a260716p45.title: Meta's Oversight Board says top AI models may be restricting free expression in its first evaluation of LLMs, as it seeks to expand its influence beyond Meta (Karissa Bell/Engadget)

a260716p46.summary: Newsletter platform Beehiiv is expanding into new avenues of engagement by launching a feature called Community, which lets subscribers of a creator chat with each other.
a260716p46.title: Beehiiv launches Community, which lets subscribers chat with each other, adds programmatic ads and an AI tool that helps creators manage their audiences (Ivan Mehta/TechCrunch)

a260716p47.summary: Alphabet Inc.'s Google is months behind schedule on delivering Gemini 3.5 Pro, its most powerful flagship AI model …
a260716p47.title: Sources: Google is months behind schedule on delivering Gemini 3.5 Pro because the company has been trying to improve its capabilities, particularly in coding (Bloomberg)

a260716p48.summary: Crypto.com secured a $400 million strategic investment from market maker Citadel Securities in a deal that values the crypto exchange at $20 billion …
a260716p48.title: Crypto.com raised $400M from Citadel Securities in its first institutional funding round, valuing the Singapore-based crypto exchange at $20B (CoinDesk)

a260716p49.summary: On file deletions. We've investigated a handful of reports where GPT-5.6 unexpectedly deleted files. What we have found is that this most commonly occurs when: - Full access mode is enabled and codex is run without sandboxing protections, including without auto review being
a260716p49.title: After reports of GPT-5.6 deleting files, OpenAI says the issue most often occurs in full-access mode without sandboxing and it is working to mitigate the risk (Tibo/@thsottiaux)

a260716p5.summary: Elon Musk's artificial-intelligence startup xAI has sued a South Carolina man arrested earlier this year on charges …
a260716p5.title: xAI sues a South Carolina man for allegedly using Grok to generate CSAM, in one of the first cases of its kind brought by an AI company against one of its users (Blake Brittain/Reuters)

a260716p50.summary: Today, we are introducing Kimi K3 — our most capable model. Kimi K3 is a 2.8T-parameter model built on our Kimi Delta Attention and Attention Residuals …
a260716p50.title: Moonshot AI releases Kimi K3, a 2.8T-parameter AI model that it says rivals Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5, and plans to release model weights by July 27 (Kimi)

a260716p51.summary: OpenAI's Sora may have shut down, but Google apparently thinks there's still interest in a tool that lets you star in your own AI videos.
a260716p51.title: Google updates its AI video editor Vids with Gemini Omni and a feature that lets users create custom digital avatars using a selfie and voice recording (Sarah Perez/TechCrunch)

a260716p54.summary: Netflix reported second-quarter revenue and earnings that were in line with analyst estimates on Thursday as Wall Street is keeping …
a260716p54.title: Netflix reports Q2 revenue up 13% YoY to $12.56B, vs. $12.59B est., and says it will give fewer engagement updates starting in 2027; NFLX drops 8%+ after hours (Lillian Rizzo/CNBC)

a260716p55.summary: Recently, I received a strange text from a new acquaintance. “You have your own biography???” it read.
a260716p55.title: An NYT reporter finds AI-generated, unauthorized biographies of herself and other journalists on Amazon, where AI-made books with elusive "authors" proliferate (Kashmir Hill/New York Times)

a260716p56.summary: Some titles used AI to create ‘enhanced crowds, historical battle sequences, and worldbuilding establishing shots.’
a260716p56.title: Netflix says roughly 300 titles used generative AI this year, mostly in post-production, "to deliver higher quality output more quickly and at a lower cost" (Emma Roth/The Verge)

a260716p57.summary: US Homeland Security Investigations recently seized more than 30,000 mobile phone SIM cards from sites around the country …
a260716p57.title: US Homeland Security says it seized 30K+ SIM cards in June and July in a nationwide operation it claims dismantled infrastructure used in telephone fraud (Lorelei Smillie/Bloomberg)

a260716p58.summary: A New York school district is piloting a humanoid robot teacher to help students with summer school classes.
a260716p58.title: A NY school district is piloting Realbotix's humanoid robot teacher to help STEM students; Realbotix rebranded after acquiring sex doll company RealDoll in 2024 (Chase DiBenedetto/Mashable)

a260716p59.summary: PayPal's (PYPL.O) board sees a $53 billion takeover bid by rival Stripe and private equity firm Advent International as undervaluing …
a260716p59.title: Source: PayPal's board sees Stripe and PE firm Advent International's $53B takeover bid as undervaluing the company and facing regulatory and financing hurdles (Reuters)

a260716p6.summary: Last year, the Marco Rubio-run State Department announced that it would start denying visas to people who worked …
a260716p6.title: A US federal judge rules the State Department engaged in unconstitutional viewpoint discrimination by denying visas to researchers studying misinfo and disinfo (Mike Masnick/Techdirt)

a260716p60.summary: Humanoid raised $150 million in the first tranche of a Series A funding round that values the London-based robotics company at $1.2 billion …
a260716p60.title: Source: UK robotics startup Humanoid raised $150M in the first tranche of a Series A at a $1.2B pre-money valuation and seeks another $80M-$100M by September (Rocket Drew/The Information)

a260716p61.summary: The European Union, which fined Elon Musk's social media network X €120 million ($137.2 million) last year …
a260716p61.title: The EU accepts X's plan to meet DSA transparency obligations and give researchers access to data, giving X six months to implement it, following a €120M fine (Foo Yun Chee/Reuters)

a260716p62.summary: Potential purchase of ArisGlobal from Swedish buyout group would boost French conglomerate's push into life sciences
a260716p62.title: Sources: Dassault Systèmes is in talks to buy drug trial software maker ArisGlobal from Nordic Capital for about $2B, extending its push into life sciences (Financial Times)

a260716p63.summary: South Korean authorities have conducted an on-site search and seizure at the local office of Montage Technology (688008.SS) …
a260716p63.title: Filing: South Korean authorities conducted an on-site search of Chinese chipmaker Montage's offices in connection with potential competition law violations (Nikita Maria Jino/Reuters)

a260716p64.summary: In a crackdown that has rankled some front offices across the league, Major League Baseball has effectively outlawed the growing practice …
a260716p64.title: Memo: MLB bans the use of league-provided dugout iPads to access GenAI for in-game strategy calls; sources say at least a third of teams used AI this way (Eno Sarris/The Athletic)

a260716p65.summary: Investors pull away from shares in companies that have led markets higher this year — US tech stocks fell sharply on Thursday …
a260716p65.title: US chip, memory, and storage stocks fell sharply on Thursday, with Sandisk down 13%, Seagate 10%, Western Digital 9%, and Intel and Micron 6% each (George Steer/Financial Times)

a260716p66.summary: Startup's valuation jumps 40% as AI boom drives demand for its data-analytics software — Coatue Management is leading …
a260716p66.title: Sources: Coatue is leading a $3B investment in Databricks that values the data analytics software company at $188B, a 40% increase from its December valuation (Wall Street Journal)

a260716p67.summary: Kalshi to Offer Betting on Drug Trial Results — Video Player is loading. — Unmute — Current Time 0:00 Loaded: 63.68% Playback Rate
a260716p67.title: Kalshi is offering wagers on the outcomes of late-stage clinical drug trials and regulatory decisions, launching a pilot of 13 new biotech contracts (Madison Muller/Bloomberg)

a260716p68.summary: Microsoft is preparing to release a new AI security product, internally codenamed Project Perception, to capture a piece of companies' rising cyber defense spending.
a260716p68.title: Source: Microsoft plans to release an AI security tool this month using models from Anthropic, OpenAI, and itself, as a cost-effective Mythos alternative (Aaron Holmes/The Information)
